data.content: Shipment review approved. Commit 67259f750b34 verified on main, CI green. Fix correctly reuses includeActiveAncestors() in the queued filter path of both beads-backend.ts and knots-backend.ts to include ancestor chains for queued children with non-queued parents. 5 regression tests added covering single-parent, deep-nesting, and exact-state guard cases. No regressions detected.
